author: Christopher Lee McClendon
name: 11L GEPA + Mixed Int6/Int8 Quantization + 7k Steps + Legal TTT
blurb: GEPA architecture with mixed quantization (int6 per-row for QAT-trained MLP/attn, int8 per-tensor for rest) enables 7000 training steps to push base model quality while staying under 16MB. Combined with legal score-first TTT (SGD, 10 epochs), achieves 1.1334 BPB.
